title: GhibliBlocks 512x
description: Hand-Painted/Ghibli Art like Minecraft Texture Pack created through structured AI image generation (+lot of manual corrections), demonstrating how far precise prompt engineering can push visual consistency and artistic control.
body:
GhibliBlocks
![GhibliBlocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9239c607740105e2d7997a803eb3d91bf2a08103_0.webp) **GhibliBlocks** is a fully hand-painted/ghibli art style Minecraft texture pack created through structured AI image generation, demonstrating how far precise prompt engineering can push visual consistency and artistic control. > **Available in 512x, 256x, and 128x resolutions, all for free!** Every texture in this pack was generated using carefully designed, highly structured prompts that enforce strict rules for seamless tiling, neutral color temperature, orthographic alignment, and consistent hand-painted Studio Ghibli–inspired watercolor and gouache aesthetics. The goal of this project is to showcase how AI can be guided to produce production-ready game assets with deliberate artistic direction. This pack serves as both a usable Minecraft texture pack and a technical showcase of what AI image generation can achieve when guided with highly detailed, rule-based prompts. The focus is on consistency, seamless integration, and maintaining a cohesive artistic direction across all textures. > **Free to use in worlds, builds, and content creation.**
